sql.if: AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND s.area_id = #{areaId}) )

AND ( (MOD(#{request.areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{request.areaId} AND #{request.areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{request.areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{request.areaId}, 100) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{request.areaId} AND #{request.areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{request.areaId}, 100) != 0 AND s.area_id = #{request.areaId}) )

mapper.select:
SELECT page_rows.id, page_rows.pressure, page_rows.flow, page_rows.temperature, page_rows.vibration, page_rows.data_status, CASE WHEN page_rows.data_status = 0 THEN '安全' WHEN page_rows.data_status = 1 THEN '良好' WHEN page_rows.data_status = 2 THEN '危险' WHEN page_rows.data_status = 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS status_text, page_rows.sensor_id, CONCAT('传感器 ', page_rows.sensor_id) AS sensor_name, CONCAT(a.province, a.city, a.district) AS area_name, p.name AS pipeline_name, page_rows.pipe_segment_id, ps.name AS pipe_segment_name, page_rows.monitor_time FROM ( SELECT i.id, i.pressure, i.traffic AS flow, i.temperature, i.shake AS vibration, i.data_status, i.sensor_id, i.create_time AS monitor_time, s.area_id, s.pipeline_id, s.pipe_segment_id FROM inspection i LEFT JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN pipe p_filter ON s.pipeline_id = p_filter.id
ORDER BY i.data_status DESC, i.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize} ) page_rows LEFT JOIN area a ON page_rows.area_id = a.id LEFT JOIN pipe p ON page_rows.pipeline_id = p.id LEFT JOIN pipe_segment ps ON page_rows.pipe_segment_id = ps.id ORDER BY page_rows.data_status DESC, page_rows.monitor_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection i
LEFT JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN pipe p ON s.pipeline_id = p.id

SELECT COUNT(*) AS sample_count, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(i.temperature), 2), 0) AS avg_temperature, COALESCE(ROUND(MIN(i.temperature), 2), 0) AS min_temperature, COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(i.temperature), 2), 0) AS max_temperature, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(i.pressure), 2), 0) AS avg_pressure, COALESCE(ROUND(MIN(i.pressure), 2), 0) AS min_pressure, COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(i.pressure), 2), 0) AS max_pressure, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(i.traffic), 2), 0) AS avg_flow, COALESCE(ROUND(MIN(i.traffic), 2), 0) AS min_flow, COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(i.traffic), 2), 0) AS max_flow, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(i.shake), 2), 0) AS avg_vibration, COALESCE(ROUND(MIN(i.shake), 2), 0) AS min_vibration, COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(i.shake), 2), 0) AS max_vibration, SUM(CASE WHEN i.data_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS danger_count, SUM(CASE WHEN i.data_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_count FROM inspection i LEFT JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN pipe p ON s.pipeline_id = p.id

SELECT i.id, i.pressure, i.traffic AS flow, i.temperature, i.shake AS vibration, i.data_status, CASE WHEN i.data_status = 0 THEN '安全' WHEN i.data_status = 1 THEN '良好' WHEN i.data_status = 2 THEN '危险' WHEN i.data_status = 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS status_text, i.sensor_id, CONCAT('传感器 ', i.sensor_id) AS sensor_name, CONCAT(a.province, a.city, a.district) AS area_name, p.name AS pipeline_name, s.pipe_segment_id, ps.name AS pipe_segment_name, i.create_time AS monitor_time FROM inspection i LEFT JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id LEFT JOIN area a ON s.area_id = a.id LEFT JOIN pipe p ON s.pipeline_id = p.id LEFT JOIN pipe_segment ps ON s.pipe_segment_id = ps.id WHERE i.id = #{id} ORDER BY i.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inspection ( pressure, traffic, temperature, shake, data_status, realtime_picture, sensor_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{pressure}, #{flow}, #{temperature}, #{vibration}, #{dataStatus}, #{realtimePicture}, #{sensorId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection SET pressure = #{pressure}, traffic = #{flow}, temperature = #{temperature}, shake = #{vibration}, sensor_id = #{sensorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT CAST(COALESCE(SUM(status_counts.status_count), 0) AS CHAR) AS total_records, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status_counts.data_status = 0 THEN status_counts.status_count ELSE 0 END), 0) AS CHAR) AS safe_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status_counts.data_status = 1 THEN status_counts.status_count ELSE 0 END), 0) AS CHAR) AS good_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status_counts.data_status = 2 THEN status_counts.status_count ELSE 0 END), 0) AS CHAR) AS danger_count, CAST(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection today_i
INNER JOIN sensor today_s ON today_i.sensor_id = today_s.id
WHERE today_i.create_time >= CURDATE() AND today_i.create_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND today_s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND today_s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND today_s.area_id = #{areaId}) )
) AS CHAR) AS today, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status_counts.data_status = 3 THEN status_counts.status_count ELSE 0 END), 0) AS CHAR) AS critical_count FROM ( SELECT i.data_status, COUNT(*) AS status_count FROM inspection i
INNER JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id
AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND s.area_id = #{areaId}) )
GROUP BY i.data_status ) status_counts

SELECT CAST(COALESCE(SUM(m.sample_count), 0) AS CHAR) AS total_records, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(m.safe_count), 0) AS CHAR) AS safe_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(m.good_count), 0) AS CHAR) AS good_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(m.danger_count), 0) AS CHAR) AS danger_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.stat_date = CURDATE() THEN m.sample_count ELSE 0 END), 0) AS CHAR) AS today, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(m.critical_count), 0) AS CHAR) AS critical_count FROM inspection_metric_daily m
AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND m.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND m.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND m.area_id = #{areaId}) )
